nasb.text: The fear of the Lord is to hate evil; Pride and arrogance and the evil way And the perverted mouth, I hate.

esv.text: The fear of the Lord is hatred of evil. Pride and arrogance and the way of evil and perverted speech I hate.

cnv.text: 敬畏耶和華就是恨惡邪惡； 驕傲、狂妄、邪惡的行為、 乖謬的口，我都恨惡。

ccb.text: 敬畏耶和华就当憎恨邪恶， 我憎恨骄傲、狂妄、恶道和谎言。

csbs.text: 敬畏耶和华就是憎恨邪恶； 我憎恨高慢、骄傲、邪恶的道路和荒谬的口。
